creator: ivan.lago@ifom-ieo-campus.it
text:
Launching portaudit with a precise port as argument reports an incorrect problems count. It seems to count the number of vulnerable packages but not the number of problems, as the generated footer seems to suggest

How-To-Repeat: root@sodio:~ portaudit apache-2.0.54_4
Affected package: apache-2.0.54_4
Type of problem: apache -- multiple vulnerabilities.
Reference: <http://www.FreeBSD.org/ports/portaudit/c115271d-602b-11dc-898c-001921ab2fa4.html>

Affected package: apache-2.0.54_4
Type of problem: apache -- mod_rewrite buffer overflow vulnerability.
Reference: <http://www.FreeBSD.org/ports/portaudit/dc8c08c7-1e7c-11db-88cf-000c6ec775d9.html>

Affected package: apache-2.0.54_4
Type of problem: apache -- mod_imap cross-site scripting flaw.
Reference: <http://www.FreeBSD.org/ports/portaudit/9fff8dc8-7aa7-11da-bf72-00123f589060.html>

1 problem(s) found.
